scripts.ios:init: node scripts/build-city.mjs kfarsaba && npx cap add ios

scripts.ios:netanya: node scripts/build-city.mjs netanya --sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.ios:raanana: node scripts/build-city.mjs raanana --sync && npx cap open ios
